detalhes: Implementar todos os endpoints REST em T:\Developer\RepositorioTrabalho\tecbakana\Forge\src\routes\. Referência: T:\DevAutomation\src\DevAutomation.Server\Controllers\DevPanelController.cs. Organizar em arquivos por domínio: config.ts, git.ts, devrequests.ts, apps.ts, agent.ts, server.ts, roadmap.ts. Registrar todos no src/index.ts sob prefixo /api. Endpoints a implementar: GET /api/config, GET /api/status, POST /api/switch, GET /api/template, POST /api/template, GET /api/git/status, GET /api/git/aheadbehind, POST /api/git/commit, POST /api/git/discard, POST /api/server/pullconfig, POST /api/restart, POST /api/agent (stub — implementado na Fase 5), GET /api/devrequests, POST /api/devrequests, PUT /api/devrequests/:id, POST /api/devrequests/action, POST /api/devrequests/responder, POST /api/start-apps, POST /api/apps/register, POST /api/apps/unregister, POST /api/apps/update, POST /api/roadmap/promote, POST /api/roadmap/update-status. Para comandos externos (git, powershell): usar child_process.execFile ou spawn com util.promisify. Criar src/utils/exec.ts com helpers runGit(args, cwd) e runPowerShell(script, args). Os endpoints de devrequests devem delegar ao OrchestratorService (stub por ora — será implementado na Fase 4).
